The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The bioactive constituents of Ayenia pauxilla include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
